CS316 · Mental Health AI Project
Embedding-Based Longitudinal Monitoring (Arabic NLP)
Applies NLP and ML to analyze Arabic textual narratives related to mental health — with trajectory-based alert logic for early risk detection.
View Project Overview
Read IEEE Paper Draft
What This Project Does
🧠
Severity Classification
Dual SVM models for depression & anxiety on 0–3 scale.
📈
Longitudinal Monitoring
Tracks mental health trajectories across time points.
⚠️
Alert Mechanism
Three alert types for worsening trends and spikes.
🛡
Responsible AI
Ethics-first, privacy-preserving research framework.

Site Features
Designed for Research Communication
🗂
Structured Navigation
Eight top-level sections covering every research stage — from introduction and methodology to results, deployment, and IEEE paper submission.
🌙
Dark Mode + TOC
Toggleable dark mode, collapsible sidebar navigation, and a floating table of contents panel for seamless reading across all pages.
💻
Interactive Code Blocks
Expandable code blocks with syntax highlighting throughout the Deployment and Methodology sections — no page reloads required.
🎨
Custom Design System
Crimson brand palette, Lora serif typography, card-grid layouts, and a custom footer with email signup — all built on Material for MkDocs.
📱
Fully Responsive
Optimized for laptop, tablet, and mobile viewing. All layouts adapt fluidly without breaking the research documentation structure.
🔗
GitHub Integration
One-click GitHub repo access, contact routing via email, and a "Made by Blueprint" attribution link in the footer.
Built with
MkDocs Material Theme Markdown Custom CSS JavaScript GitHub Pages Google Fonts Lora Serif DM Sans
